docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-29-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-29-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $730.11 FILED BY FEELY, SCOTT ` (DRIVER AND REGISTERED OWNER) AS TO DEFENDANT COHN, STEVE (DRIVER AND REGISTERED OWNER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FEELY, SCOTT ` (DRIVER AND REGISTERED OWNER) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COHN, STEVE (DRIVER AND REGISTERED OWNER) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($25.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED JUN-19-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT COHN, STEVE (DRIVER AND REGISTERED OWNER)
